text: Healthy living is about more than just eating your vegetables. A balanced diet with plenty of fruits, vegetables, and whole grains gives you energy for the day. Regular exercise, even just a 30-minute walk, keeps your body strong and your mind clear. Don't underestimate the power of sleep—getting seven to nine hours each night helps your body repair and your brain process information. Mental health is just as important. Take time to relax, talk to friends, or practice mindfulness. Finally, maintain a good work-life balance. Set boundaries between work and personal time to avoid burnout. Remember, small, consistent habits create a healthier, happier you.
